## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- The PR title must be a Conventional Commit (enforced by commitlint). -->

- [ ] `fix:` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat:` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] `docs:` / `chore:` / `refactor:` / `test:` / `ci:` / `build:`
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped to hand-rolled code (`src/onepin/_cli/`, `tests/`), not the generated SDK under `src/onepin/`
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (regression test for bug fixes)
- [ ] PR title is a valid Conventional Commit
- [ ] Did **not** hand-edit `CHANGELOG.md` or the version (release automation owns both)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, or context that isn't obvious from the diff. -->
